description: Research National Primary Drinking Water Regulations (Title 40, Part 141) at https://www.ecfr.gov/ to identify the Maximum Contaminant Levels (MCLs) for Arsenic, Nitrate (as Nitrogen), and Total Trihalomethanes (TTHM). Create a compliance reference file at ~/Documents/water_mcl_limits.json with the structure: {"regulation_source": "40 CFR Part 141", "contaminants": {"arsenic": {"mcl_mg_L": <number>, "citation": "<Section Number>"}, "nitrate": {"mcl_mg_L": <number>, "citation": "<Section Number>"}, "total_trihalomethanes": {"mcl_mg_L": <number>, "citation": "<Section Number>"}}}. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named "EPA Compliance" containing bookmarks for the specific regulation sections where these values were found.
